payload.input_str: {'sql': 'SELECT s.Name, COUNT(sc.concert_ID) AS concert_count FROM singer s LEFT JOIN singer_in_concert sc ON s.Singer_ID = sc.Singer_ID GROUP BY s.Name;'}

inputs.sql: SELECT s.Name, COUNT(sc.concert_ID) AS concert_count FROM singer s LEFT JOIN singer_in_concert sc ON s.Singer_ID = sc.Singer_ID GROUP BY s.Name;
